tasks.title: 1. Run multi-agent research on Ethereum's role in enabling agentic commerce, defining agentic commerce, key projects, initiatives, technical features, and recent developments.
2. Use find_node to locate relevant nodes like Capabilities, Milestones, Trends, Ideas related to Ethereum, crypto-currency, AI agents, commerce.
3. Scan ideas with diverse probes on agentic commerce, Ethereum agents, blockchain AI commerce.
4. Scan trends with emtech_filter 'crypto-currency' on agentic commerce and AI agents.
5. Execute Cypher queries for Ethereum-related nodes, e.g., PTCs or Parties making Ethereum products.
7. Synthesize all findings for the prompt.
